enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Dhana'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying the emotions of love and longing.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Madha Gaja Raja'?

This song captures a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the protagonist's feelings for their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Nee Dhana'?

The song is sung and composed by Vijay Antony, who is also the music director.

When was 'Nee Dhana' released?

The song was released on January 13, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Dhana, the protagonist expresses profound love and longing, encapsulating the essence of romance in the film Madha Gaja Raja. The lyrics by Pa Vijay evoke a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth, making it relatable for anyone in love. The soothing melody, crafted by Vijay Antony, enhances the heartfelt sentiments conveyed in the song. This track serves as a beautiful reminder of the power of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Dhana from the movie Madha Gaja Raja is a captivating romantic melody that showcases Vijay Antony's soulful voice. The heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay beautifully express deep emotions, making it a perfect listen for lovebirds. Experience the enchanting vibe of this song that resonates with nostalgia and affection.
stanzaMeanings: You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; in my heart, rain is falling. You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; you are the one who gives life to me.
Every moment, I think of you and my heart is filled with thoughts of you.
What I say is true; in the night and day, I breathe you in. I think about how you and I walk together in the morning.
You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; in my heart, rain is falling. You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; you are the one who gives life to me.

My day is my day, hey you are mine, you are mine; from the first rain of the evening, hey you are the one, you are the one; the bright nights, hey you are the one, you are the one; the gentle breeze, hey you are the one.
You came slowly, like a thief, you came, you are the one.
Before the fight, you entered my heart and created a storm, you are the one.
You are mine, you are mine.....
You are a book to someone, you are the one; a drop of rain, you are the one; oh you are the one; the beginning of beauty, you are the one; hey you are the one; the young moon, you are the one.
Touching the heart, in the eyes, like a lightning strike, you are the one.
You created a smile like lightning, I don't know what you did, you are the one.
You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; in my heart, rain is falling. You are mine, you are mine, you are mine, you are mine; you are the one who gives life to me.
